name: cjk-text-layout
description: Audit Chinese, Japanese, and Korean text layout against W3C requirements.

interface.shortDescription: Audit CJK typography and layout against W3C requirements.
interface.longDescription: CJK Text Layout helps agents review Chinese, Japanese, and Korean rendered text for locale-aware typography issues including line breaking, punctuation placement, ruby annotations, vertical writing, mixed-script spacing, justification, and ebook or PDF page layout.
defaultPrompt: Audit this CJK webpage for W3C text layout issues.
Check this EPUB or PDF for Japanese, Chinese, or Korean layout defects.
Review CJK line breaking, punctuation, ruby, spacing, and vertical text.
